writing_topics: Should children be allowed to own a cell phone? Give at least two reasons.
Is it better to live in a big city or a small town? Explain your preference.
Do you think social media has a positive or negative impact on teenagers?
Is online learning more effective than traditional classroom learning?
listening_scripts: There is a French version as well as an Italian version of this opera.
The salmonella bacteria are directly associated with turtles.
